wiki.content: “Phone (Interlude)” is the seventh track on slayr’s mixtape “Half Blood,” which was released in 2025. It serves as an interlude for this particular work, and the very name “interlude” implies that it is an element used in order to break up the narrative into two parts. Interludes usually are relatively short compared to tracks, hence they provide a kind of relaxation without breaking the general storyline. It should also be mentioned that “Phone (Interlude)” includes another member of the Lockehearts collective known as TJAYY, who used to be a member of it at one point. As a result, this cooperation can be regarded as a reminder of the relationship shared by slayr and TJAYY. In other words, it does not imply that this particular track just randomly included another person; rather, it was needed to revive some old memories. “Phone (Interlude)” was produced by slayr. slayr & TJAYY released “Phone (Interlude)” on November 5, 2025.
